description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: Endless runners should have simple controls that allow players to focus on timing and reflexes.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game must feature escalating difficulty to maintain player engagement.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Visual and audio feedback should be immediate to reinforce player actions.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: A high score system is essential to encourage replayability and competition.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: The game should include obstacles that require quick decision-making and precise timing.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
